en_title: Former Xbox Studio Compulsion Games Says It's Open to Collaborations
cn_title: 前XBOX工作室Compulsion Games开放合作
subtitle: 独立后寻求合作
opus_summary: 独立后的Compulsion Games在LinkedIn表示愿与业内工作室合作，提供支持开发或联合开发服务；其最新作品《午夜之南》获IGN 8分。

paragraphs.en: Montreal-based developer Compulsion Games, who avoided closure amidst the by Xbox Game Studios this month by negotiating its independence , has taken to to let other developers and publishers know that they are open for business – and seemingly open to working as a support studio and/or co-developer on another team's project.
paragraphs.cn: 蒙特利尔开发商Compulsion Games本月通过协商独立，避免了被XBOX Game Studios[原文缺失]；如今它发帖告知其他开发商和发行商，工作室已开放业务，并愿意为其他团队的项目提供支持开发或联合开发。

paragraphs.en: "With Compulsion Games returning to its roots as an independent developer, we are expanding opportunities to collaborate with studios across the games and entertainment industry," the studio's LinkedIn post reads. "We invite partners to leverage the talent and creativity of the award-winning team behind South of Midnight...We are excited to support the development of memorable experiences that engage and entertain players around the world." The full statement is below:
paragraphs.cn: 该工作室在LinkedIn帖子中写道：「Compulsion Games回归独立开发者的根基后，我们正在扩大与游戏及娱乐行业各工作室合作的机会。我们欢迎合作伙伴借助《午夜之南》背后这支获奖团队的才华与创意……我们很高兴支持开发能够吸引并娱乐全球玩家的难忘体验。」完整声明如下：

paragraphs.en: Compulsion released 2025's South of Midnight to critical acclaim, receiving an 8 out of 10 (Great) from IGN and a "Generally Favorable" rating on the review-aggregate website Metacritic . Xbox the studio in 2018 after it had developed We Happy Few and Contrast prior to that.
paragraphs.cn: Compulsion于2025年推出《午夜之南》，广受好评，IGN给出8分（优秀），评论汇总网站Metacritic则评为「总体好评」。XBOX于2018年收购了该工作室（原文缺失动词）；此前工作室曾开发《We Happy Few》和《Contrast》。

paragraphs.en: Xbox's parting of ways with Compulsion (and Double Fine, Undead Labs, Ninja Theory, and Arkane) comes as the first-party publisher looks to focus its efforts on its biggest franchises – a strategy I've got an idea for regarding how it might play out .
paragraphs.cn: XBOX与Compulsion（以及Double Fine、Undead Labs、Ninja Theory和Arkane）分道扬镳之际，这家第一方发行商正寻求将精力集中在最大牌的系列上——至于这一策略可能如何发展，我已经有了一个想法。

paragraphs.en: Ryan McCaffrey is IGN's executive editor of previews and host of both IGN's weekly Xbox show, Podcast Unlocked , as well as our semi-retired interview show, IGN Unfiltered . He's a North Jersey guy, so it's "Taylor ham," not "pork roll." Debate it with him on Twitter at @DMC_Ryan .
paragraphs.cn: Ryan McCaffrey是IGN预览内容执行编辑，主持每周XBOX节目《Podcast Unlocked》，也主持半退休的访谈节目《IGN Unfiltered》。他来自新泽西北部，所以叫「Taylor ham」，不是「pork roll」。欢迎在Twitter上@DMC_Ryan与他辩论。
